steps.title: Read the graph at 600 kelvins
steps.content: The horizontal axis is temperature $x$, and the vertical axis is pressure $y$. Locate $x=600$ kelvins on the graph, then read the $y$-value where the line passes through that vertical position.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: At $x=600$, the graph shows $y=12$. The estimated pressure is $12$ psi, which matches choice B — B is correct.
